emails.subject: RE: Power Engineers CA
emails.body: Gerald, I talked with Kurt on this and I told him that we would delete the sentence for Section 3 as it seemed redundant. He agreed that we would leave sections 6 and 9 alone. If you concur, would you please put together execution copies for me to sign and get out. If not let's discuss and push this forward. Chris Forwarded by Chris Hilgert/HOU/ECT on 04/05/2001 02:52 PM Kurt Bell 6343 <kbell@powereng.com> 03/11/2001 04:49 PM
